The Friday Note — Issue #6

The 10x PMM

March 20, 2026 • The Future of PMM

Welcome

This week I've been thinking about what separates PMM teams that are using AI from teams that are transformed by it. The tools are the same. The difference is the thinking.

So we built something: The 10x PMM Scorecard — an interactive assessment that maps your team's AI maturity across Content, Competitive Intel, and Demand Gen. Take it, see where you stand against benchmarks, and identify your biggest leverage points.

Plus: a conversation with Will Scott of Pragmatic Institute on why your prompt is not a question — it's a workflow. And what Austin Lau at Anthropic can teach us about running a $60B marketing operation solo.

—Chris

New This Week

The 10x PMM Scorecard

I've been writing about the "10x PMM" for months — the idea that AI doesn't just make good PMMs faster, it makes the gap between good and great exponentially wider. But until now, there hasn't been a way to actually measure where you fall.

🔥 Interactive Tool

Assess Your Team's AI Readiness

Three scorecards. Eighteen dimensions. Five maturity levels each. See how you compare to average PMM teams — and to the 10x frontier.

✏️ Content PMM 🎯 Competitive Intel 📈 Demand Gen
Take the Assessment →

Warning: it's honest. Most teams score between 1.5 and 2.5 on a 5-point scale. The 10x benchmark averages 4.4.

Learning of the Week

Your Prompt Is Not a Question — It's a Workflow

Will Scott is a Certified Instructor at Pragmatic Institute who's been training product managers and marketers for years. Last week, he showed me a prompt that changed how I think about AI-assisted work entirely.

📚 Deep Dive

The Prompt Is the Process

Instead of asking AI to write a video script, Will built a prompt that turns the AI into the strategist running the discovery session.

Read the full article →

"A prompt gives you an output. A process gives you an output that's grounded in reality."

— Will Scott, Pragmatic Institute

Case Study

How to Run a $60B Marketing Operation by Yourself

For ten months, Austin Lau was Anthropic's entire growth marketing function. One person. Paid search, social, email, SEO — all of it. The company was worth $60 billion.

🚀 Case Study

The 10x PMM in Practice

Austin had never opened a terminal. Then he built his own tools with Claude Code and operated at 10x scale.

Read the full case study →

News Roundup

What Happened This Week

Workday

Sana from Workday launches worldwide

"Superintelligence for work" — enterprise connectors to Salesforce, Teams, Slack, SharePoint.

Salesforce

Agentforce Contact Center unifies AI + voice + CRM

114% AI revenue surge. 6,000+ paid Agentforce deals.

Oracle

1,000+ AI agents now embedded across Fusion apps

Healthcare EHR live with proven results.

Adobe + NVIDIA

Firefly partnership announced at GTC

Joint AI infrastructure for creative ops. CEO Narayen stepping down.
